title: galanthus nivalis subsp. elwesii
intro: Galanthus nivalis subsp. elwesii, also known as the Elwes' snowdrop, is a subspecies of the snowdrop plant (Galanthus nivalis) that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antispasmodic and expectorant effects, which can help to alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and other respiratory issues. The health benefits of Galanthus nivalis subsp. elwesii include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve circulation, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for cardiovascular health and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into infusions, tinctures, or ointments, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions, from colds and flu to skin conditions and wounds.
